---
name: Question
about: Ask for help with TokenPak
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## What are you trying to do?

Describe the task or use case you're working on.

## What have you tried?

What steps have you already taken? (e.g., "Checked the docs", "Ran tokenpak doctor", etc.)

## Relevant config/code

If applicable, share:
- Your TokenPak config file (remove sensitive keys)
- Python code or CLI command you're running
- Environment variables (without API keys)

## Error output

If you're seeing an error, paste it here (including traceback if helpful).

## Environment

- **TokenPak version:** (run `tokenpak --version`)
- **Python version:** (run `python --version`)
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **LLM client:** (e.g., Claude Code, OpenAI SDK, LangChain, etc.)

---

💡 **Tip:** Questions might get faster answers in [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/tokenpak/tokenpak/discussions/new?category=q-a) — try there first!
